description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, geometric design with a mix of dark and light exterior finishes. The front yard is paved with stone tiles and adorned with ornamental trees, while the backyard includes a spacious lawn, a swimming pool with lounge chairs, and a wooden deck area. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor spaces. The property is enclosed by a low fence and includes a driveway with a covered carport. The landscaping is thoughtfully arranged with rows of trees along the sides and decorative shrubs. The overall layout emphasizes open, functional outdoor living areas and a contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a paved front yard, and a backyard featuring a pool, deck, and landscaped greenery. The property is enclosed by a low fence and includes a driveway and carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the paved driveway, carport, main entrance, and ornamental trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long driveway, side windows, and the transition from paved to grassy backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, lounge chairs, wooden deck, and large backyard windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the paved area, side landscaping, and the rear pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
